message:
fix(messaging): use pool-aware blocking spawn, recheck records before wait, remove redundant type annotations

Kafka blocking dispatch (kafka.rs):
- run_kafka_blocking now uses spawn_blocking_on_pool when a blocking
  pool handle is available, avoiding the overhead of setting a thread-
  local Cx guard. The stale spawn_blocking import is removed.
- Gate run_kafka_blocking behind cfg(feature = "kafka") since it is
  only used in the kafka feature path.

Kafka consumer poll (kafka_consumer.rs):
- Move ensure_open, ensure_has_subscription, try_poll_local_record,
  and deadline checks *before* the poll_fn waiter registration instead
  of after. Previously, a record produced between entering the loop
  and registering the waiter would not be noticed until the waiter
  timed out (up to the full poll timeout), causing unnecessary latency.
- Add PollBeforeWaitHook (test-only) to deterministically control the
  window between loop entry and waiter registration, enabling a
  focused regression test.
- Added test: consumer_poll_rechecks_brokerless_records_after_waiter_
  registration — verifies the record is returned immediately rather
  than after the timeout.

Channel session (session.rs):
- Remove unnecessary explicit type annotations on TrackedSender::reserve
  and TrackedSender::send return values, clearing clippy lint noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
